tasks.subject: Task 1: nextjs-scaffold — dashboard tree + verbatim example feature
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `src/app/dashboard/` to the scaffold tree, replace `[generate]` example feature with 13 verbatim files, sharpen routes.ts spec, update AGENTS.md template.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dashboard layout.tsx and (overview)/page.tsx appear as [verbatim — Part C] in tree
- [ ] src/features/example/ lists all 13 files as [verbatim — Part C]
- [ ] routes.ts annotation specifies HOME:'/', DASHBOARD:'/dashboard', HEALTH:'/api/health'
- [ ] AGENTS.md template mentions dashboard/ as authenticated route group
- [ ] Part C contains all 13 example feature files + 2 dashboard files verbatim
- [ ] Step 9 references dashboard/(overview)/page.tsx, removes stale "if present" qualifier

**Verify:** `grep 'generate.*example' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` → 0 matches

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep 'generate.*example' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["[generate] example entry gone", "15 new [verbatim] entries added", "dashboard/ in tree", "Part C has all 13 example + 2 dashboard blocks"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: nextjs-add-auth — conditional dashboard + additive routes step
tasks.description:
